top_signals.title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
top_signals.summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: Politics getting in the way.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trafigura Targets Gupta Dubai Assets In Bid to Recoup Lost Nickel Millions
top_signals.summary: Trafigura Group asked a Dubai court to tighten financial restrictions on Prateek Gupta’s wife, as it looks to recoup more than $700 million in damages owed by him for sales of fake nickel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic chief tells G7 leaders to ‘resist the temptation to splinter’ over AI
top_signals.summary: Dario Amodei is supported by rival Sam Altman in call for international co-operation
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Short Seller Left Loses Mistrial Request Over Court Error
top_signals.summary: Famed short seller Andrew Left, convicted on 13 counts of securities fraud earlier this month, lost his request for a mistrial over an unusual courtroom error that marred the end of his three-week trial.

top_signals.title: Partners-Backed Eolo in Talks With Apollo Over Private Debt
top_signals.summary: Italian internet provider Eolo SpA is in advanced talks with Apollo Global Management over a roughly €500 million ($574 million) private debt package to refinance its liabilities, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Energy Fuels lands $725M Pentagon loan for rare earths boost
top_signals.summary: Energy Fuels shares jumped after securing financing from the US government to expand local rare earth processing capacity.

top_signals.title: CORE POWER to Assess Reactor Tech for Floating Nuclear Power Plants
top_signals.summary: CORE POWER has launched a feasibility study to evaluate the use of BWX Technologies' mPower small modular reactor (SMR) technology in floating nuclear power plants designed to be built in shipyards and deployed near energy demand centers.The study will assess technical…

top_signals.title: ALMACO Group Opens New Facility in League City, Texas
top_signals.summary: ALMACO Group Inc., a leader in engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC solutions) for the marine and offshore industries, has officially announced its expansion into League City, Texas. Operational from June, 2026, the new location, operating under the name ALMACO Gulf Coast…
